revision.comment: Updating unknown parameter tracking through [[User:Zackmann08/AddCheckForUnknownParameters.js|AddCheckForUnknownParameters]] using [[Module:check for unknown parameters]]
1 revision imported: overwriting the contents of [[Template:Infobox Chinese]]
Bot: strip HTML comments; convert 4 straggler wikilink(s) to {{ill}} (resolved via Wikidata) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/26356372110|time triggered pipeline]]
